CVE-2020-36968.title: M/Monit 3.7.4 contains an authentication vulnerability that allow ...
CVE-2020-36968.description: M/Monit 3.7.4 contains an authentication vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers to retrieve user password hashes through an administrative API endpoint. Attackers can send requests to the /api/1/admin/users/list and /api/1/admin/users/get endpoints to extract MD5 password hashes for all users.

CVE-2020-36969.title: M/Monit 3.7.4 contains a privilege escalation vulnerability that  ...
CVE-2020-36969.description: M/Monit 3.7.4 contains a privilege escalation vulnerability that allows authenticated users to modify user permissions by manipulating the admin parameter. Attackers can send a POST request to the /api/1/admin/users/update endpoint with a crafted payload to grant administrative access to a standard user account.

CVE-2022-26563.title: An issue was discovered in Tildeslash Monit before 5.31.0, allows ...
CVE-2022-26563.description: An issue was discovered in Tildeslash Monit before 5.31.0, allows remote attackers to gain escilated privlidges due to improper PAM-authorization.
